post.subject: Jealous?
post.body: Fuck... its the strangest feeling in the world - but it feels amazing! So i tell on person I'll go out with them on New Years Eve, someone else finds out and gets jealous! I mean, seriously, jealous! I am shocked! Why would anyone be jealous of something to do with me! It makes me so happy, it truely does! I can not believe it. I feel loved! Just hope you can figure out what your doing lol! I love it! You have both made me happy!
